title: OpenShift
blurb: Red Hat's enterprise Kubernetes, in depth: cluster architecture and the API request flow, SCCs and the arbitrary-UID contract, S2I builds, a deep networking track (the pod network model, CNI, OpenShift SDN vs OVN-Kubernetes, Routes, and NetworkPolicy), storage, scheduling & autoscaling, GitOps cluster management, logging with Loki, service mesh, and the oc troubleshooting toolkit.
